title: Tempered Sweet Spanish Rum Tart
description: A buttery chocolate tart infused with light rum, tempered for a silky finish. Perfect for a cozy brunch or sweet snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180C and line a fondue pot with parchment paper.
Whisk the flour, sugar, and salt in a bowl and beat in the softened butter until the mixture resembles crumbs.
Add the egg and mix until a dough forms, then press it into the fondue pot and bake for 15 minutes until lightly golden.
Whisk the heavy cream and rum in a small saucepan until it simmers, then remove from heat and stir in the chopped chocolate until smooth.
Pour the tempered chocolate mixture over the baked crust, smoothing it with a spatula.
Return the pot to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, then let the tart cool before slicing.
Serve slices warm with a dusting of powdered sugar or a scoop of vanilla ice cream if desired.
